title: The Fifa World Cup 2026 is Printing Views ⚽

transcript.text: These creators are printing millions of views off of the FIFA World Cup, but none of them are football channels. This creator is eating a national dish of every World Cup team and then burning off the calories. >> Not worth it. >> Nah, I think it is actually. This creator is turning World Cup stadiums into cultural art history breakdowns. >> They also got this dude who can paint like nobody's business. >> This was the best art I could do at short notice. And a creator who customizes sneakers cut open the official World Cup ball and turn it into footwear. 8.4 million views. >> [screaming] >> None of these channels are about football, but they didn't change their niche. They simply pointed their format at the biggest event of the year. And that is the YouTube strategy. They took a trend and turned it into a hook about things they already make videos of. Find that wave early enough and it could work for you, too.
